output:
exit_code=0
Usage: tvly extract [OPTIONS] URLS...

  Extract content from one or more URLs.

  Provide URLs as positional arguments (max 20).

Options:
  --query TEXT                    Rerank chunks by relevance to this query.
  --chunks-per-source INTEGER     Chunks per source (1-5, requires --query).
  --extract-depth [basic|advanced]
                                  Extraction depth.
  --format [markdown|text]        Output format.
  --include-images                Include image URLs.
  --timeout FLOAT                 Max wait time in seconds (1-60).
  -o, --output TEXT               Save output to file.
  --json                          Output as JSON.
  --help                          Show this message and exit.
